tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: How Can You Mend A Broken Heart

content:
[Intro]
[ch]Dbmaj7[/ch] [ch]Dbmaj7/Eb[/ch] [ch]Abadd2[/ch] [ch]Ab/Gb[/ch]
[ch]Dbmaj7[/ch] [ch]Eb7[/ch] [ch]Abadd2[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]        [ch]Abadd2[/ch]             [ch]Db/Ab[/ch]
Saying goodbye is never an easy thing,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Absus4[/ch]                [ch]Abadd2[/ch]
But you never said that you'd stay forever.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Abadd2[/ch]               [ch]Db/Ab[/ch]
So if you must go, oh darling I'll set you free,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Db/Ab[/ch] [ch]Bbdim7[/ch]             [ch]Fm7[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]
But I know in time         we'll be together.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                 [ch]Abadd2/C[/ch]
     I won't try to stop you now from leaving,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Db[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F7sus4[/ch]
'cause in my heart I know.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
Love will lead you back,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dbmaj7/Eb[/ch]
Someday I just know that,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Abadd2[/ch]
Love will lead you back to my arms,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F7[/ch]             [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
Where you belong, I'm sure.[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dbmaj7/Eb[/ch]
Sure as stars are shining,[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Abadd2[/ch]
One day you will find me again,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gbsus2[/ch]   [ch]Ab/Gb[/ch]
It won't be long,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Eb7[/ch]                 [ch]Abadd2[/ch]   [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]
One of these days, oh love will lead you back.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]              [ch]Abadd2[/ch]               [ch]Db/Ab[/ch]
One of these nights I'll hear your voice again,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Absus4[/ch]           [ch]Abadd2[/ch]
You're gonna say how much you miss me.[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Abadd2[/ch]                  [ch]Db/Ab[/ch]
You'll walk out this door but someday you'll walk back in,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Db/Ab[/ch]  [ch]Bbdim7[/ch]              [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]
Darlin' I know,         I know this will be.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                           [ch]Abadd2/C[/ch]
     Sometimes it takes, some time out on your own now,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]F7sus4[/ch]
To find your way back home.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]

[tab]                 [ch]Abadd2[/ch]
One day you will find me again,[/tab]

[tab]             [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Eb7[/ch]                 [ch]Abadd2[/ch]   [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]
